Video.summary: Consider why Pompeii offers more than just a story of cataclysm.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Reflections on and of Pompeii

Video.summary: Examine the geological forces that forged the Bay of Naples.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Image.alt: Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples
Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples
Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Video.summary: Uncover the history of Pompeii\'s excavation in the 1700.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: The Rediscovery of Vesuvian Lands

Video.summary: Delve deep into Pompeii\'s remote Etruscan history.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Etruscan Pompeii - 5th Century B.C.

Video.summary: Begin your survey of this amazing year with some context on the state of the world before 1215.
Video.grandparentTitle: Years That Changed History: 1215
Video.title: The World before 1215

Video.summary: Discover the surprisingly narrowly focused origins of a short-lived document.
Video.grandparentTitle: Years That Changed History: 1215
Video.title: The Magna Carta: Patching Up a Squabble

Image.alt: The Magna Carta: Patching Up a Squabble
The Magna Carta: Patching Up a Squabble
The Magna Carta: Patching Up a Squabble

Video.summary: Continue your study of the Magna Carta by investigating some of its most interesting clauses.
Video.grandparentTitle: Years That Changed History: 1215
Video.title: What's Really in the Magna Carta?

Image.alt: What's Really in the Magna Carta?
What's Really in the Magna Carta?
What's Really in the Magna Carta?

Video.summary: In this episode, trace the Magna Carta's intriguing story across the ages.
Video.grandparentTitle: Years That Changed History: 1215
Video.title: The Magna Carta's Legacy

Video.summary: Consider the imaginary lives of ordinary people who lived on the other side of history.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Taking on the Other Side of History

Image.alt: Taking on the Other Side of History
Taking on the Other Side of History
Taking on the Other Side of History

Video.summary: Take a look at the lives of our ancestors, from ancient hominids to Homo erectus to the earliest humans.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Being Paleolithic

Video.summary: Step into the world's earliest permanent settlement: the river banks in Mesopotamia.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Living in Mesopotamia

Video.summary: Travel to the world's first Western civilization and explore everyday life during the New Kingdom era.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Other Side of History: Daily Life in the Ancient World
Video.title: Being Egyptian

Video.summary: Discover how Quo Vadis ushered in the golden age of the "sword-and-sandal" picture.
Video.grandparentTitle: A Historian Goes to the Movies: Ancient Rome
Video.title: Quo Vadis Kick-Starts the Sword-and-Sandal Genre

Image.alt: Quo Vadis Kick-Starts the Sword-and-Sandal Genre
Quo Vadis Kick-Starts the Sword-and-Sandal Genre
Quo Vadis Kick-Starts the Sword-and-Sandal Genre

Video.summary: Analyze the accuracies of the film's iconic naval battle and chariot race sequences.
Video.grandparentTitle: A Historian Goes to the Movies: Ancient Rome
Video.title: Ben-Hur: The Greatest Chariot Race

Video.summary: Discover what makes the epic film Spartacus something of a cinematic oddity.
Video.grandparentTitle: A Historian Goes to the Movies: Ancient Rome
Video.title: Spartacus: Kubrick's Controversial Epic

Video.summary: How did 1963's Cleopatra destroy the golden age of epic films set in ancient Rome?
Video.grandparentTitle: A Historian Goes to the Movies: Ancient Rome
Video.title: Cleopatra: Spectacle Gone Wild

Video.summary: Gen. Clark begins the series by plunging you into combat with a 25-year-old Army captain in Vietnam in 1970.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: America: Forged in War

Video.summary: Analyze Washington's brilliant defense of Boston and his disastrous defeat trying to hold New York City.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: George Washington Takes Command

Video.summary: Follow the next four years of the revolution, which ended with the British surrender at Yorktown in 1781.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army

Image.alt: Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army
Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army
Redcoats Fall to the Continental Army

Video.summary: One military genius who emerged from the War of 1812: Andrew Jackson, the hero of the Battle of New Orleans.
Video.grandparentTitle: American Military History: From Colonials to Counterinsurgents
Video.title: Andrew Jackson and the War of 1812

Image.alt: Andrew Jackson and the War of 1812
Andrew Jackson and the War of 1812

Video.summary: Examine the collision of Europeans, Africans, and Native Americans in the New World.
Video.grandparentTitle: Conquest of the Americas
Video.title: Three Peoples Collide

Video.summary: Most of the inhabitants of the Americas arrived from Asia between 40,000 and 2,000 B.C.
Video.grandparentTitle: Conquest of the Americas
Video.title: The Native Americans

Video.summary: Explore the empires and cultural developments of the Aztecs, Incas, and Maya.
Video.grandparentTitle: Conquest of the Americas
Video.title: Mayas, Aztecs, and Incas

Video.summary: Spain and Portugal shifted trade into the Atlantic, leading to New World expeditions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Conquest of the Americas
Video.title: Europeans and Africans

Video.summary: Meet the earliest civilizations of the Tigris-Euphrates, Nile, and Indus River valleys.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Origins of Great Ancient Civilizations
Video.title: Cradles of Civilization

Video.summary: Here, explore the economic, social, and religious life of the Sumerians.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Origins of Great Ancient Civilizations
Video.title: First Cities of Sumer

Video.summary: A look at kings, scribes, and soldiers illuminates the creation of political institutions.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Origins of Great Ancient Civilizations
Video.title: Mesopotamian Kings and Scribes

Video.summary: Examine the career and kingdom of Hammurabi, King of Babylon.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Origins of Great Ancient Civilizations
Video.title: Hammurabi's Babylon

Video.summary: Focus on the so-called early dynastic period and the Old Kingdom.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Origins of Great Ancient Civilizations
Video.title: Egypt in the Pyramid Age

Video.summary: Examine a period of Egyptian history contemporaneous with Hammurabi\'s Babylon.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Origins of Great Ancient Civilizations
Video.title: The Middle Kingdom

Video.summary: Egypt\'s monarchy dominated the Near East until the "Sea Peoples" attacked.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Origins of Great Ancient Civilizations
Video.title: Imperial Egypt

Video.summary: Take a closer look at three areas influenced by the early river valley civilizations.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Origins of Great Ancient Civilizations
Video.title: New Peoples of the Bronze Age
